title: Example Development code bugfix
brief: Template for a small Development code bugfix run. Copy this shape for real legal/dev tickets and update the issue, repo, workingDir, branch, allowed write scope, and acceptance criteria.

taskRoute.source: Example legal/dev app ticket, not main app stage.
taskRoute.decision: Samuel explicitly routes aila-code repositories as legal/dev app work; main app stage uses aila-quillio repos.

criteria.statement: The selected bug is fixed without changing unrelated behavior.
criteria.verification: Targeted regression test fails before the fix or clearly covers the bug path, then passes after the fix.

criteria.statement: The repo's practical local quality checks pass or any local/CI parity gap is recorded.
criteria.verification: Attach test/build/lint evidence or a documented local exception.

testExpectation.notes: Verification/test roles freeze this before implementation. Builders receive visible suites only; holdout details stay with the verifier.

visible.summary: Visible regression command the builder may run for fast feedback.

holdout.summary: Verifier-owned holdout command. Replace with the real sealed command for the ticket.

coordination.messageTopology: Foreman-mediated handoff; ticket comments and gate files are the source of truth.
coordination.authorityDistribution: Foreman owns stage advancement, evidence checks, No Mistakes, push, and PR commands.
coordination.syncMode: bounded async review with typed verdict files
coordination.aggregation: typed PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL/BLOCKED verdicts with evidence refs
coordination.termination: stop on PASS, budget exhaustion, or BLOCKED escalation
coordination.failureHandling: retry inside loop budget, then escalate without pretending success
coordination.informationPolicy: builder sees the frozen contract; hidden holdouts stay with the independent judge
coordination.computeAccounting: record model/tool usage estimates as evidence, not billing truth

loop.trigger: A required gate or acceptance check fails during the ticket run.
loop.judge: Claude Opus 4.8 max independent review after Codex build
loop.memory: Foreman run manifest, Paperclip ledger, evidence pack, and PR comments
loop.exitCondition: implementation passes verification/security/evidence gates, or loop exhausts and escalates
loop.escalation: block the ticket with exact failing command/finding and next owner

loops.trigger: Immediately after the planning team returns a plan and before implementation starts, push back to the planning team exactly once and ask: Is there anything else that has been missed? Are there any errors? Are there any conflicts in the plan?
loops.judge: Foreman verifies the one planning-team challenge was sent once and the response or lack of response was recorded before implementation proceeds.
loops.memory: Ticket comments, Foreman loop event, run manifest, and evidence/source of truth for the planning-team response or lack of response.
loops.exitCondition: The one adversarial plan challenge is recorded with the planning team response or lack of response.
loops.escalation: If the challenge finds missed work, errors, or conflicts, return to the planning team for correction before implementation proceeds.

loops.trigger: tests, lint, typecheck, build, reproduction, or acceptance criteria fail
loops.judge: verification-lead pass on targeted and practical repo checks
loops.memory: Foreman loop events plus test/build evidence artifacts
loops.exitCondition: checks pass or failure is escalated as blocked
loops.escalation: verification-lead records blocker and asks OpenClaw/Samuel only when decision is ambiguous

loops.trigger: Claude, security, CI, reviewer, or No Mistakes returns an actionable finding
loops.judge: same reviewer/gate passes for the exact current head and routed base
loops.memory: review findings, gate outputs, regression checks, PR comments
loops.exitCondition: finding resolved with evidence, or per-finding escalation after cap
loops.escalation: block with actionable finding list and owner/action

loops.trigger: a real bug, review finding, browser QA failure, or telemetry issue is fixed
loops.judge: scenario captures the old failure path and has a verification command or Webwright flow
loops.exitCondition: scenario stored or visible reason recorded
loops.escalation: create an Improvement Report if a reusable scenario cannot be captured
